title: System Architect
description: Designing complex frontend systems with high interactivity, real-time synchronization, and AI component integration

hero.name: Damir Karimov
hero.subtitle:
Specializes in designing complex frontend systems with high interactivity, real-time synchronization, and AI component integration. The main focus is building architectures that remain manageable as business logic, user roles, and external integrations scale.

Experienced in developing multi-tier platforms with financial operations, document workflows, access roles, and complex user scenarios. Works closely across frontend, backend, and automation services to ensure system consistency at the semantic contract and state level.

competencies.title: Key Competencies
items: Architecture design based on <one>Feature-Sliced Design</one> (layer and module isolation)
Building complex <one>UI systems</one> with multiple roles and scenarios
Implementing <one>real-time</one> logic (<two>WebSockets</two>, event synchronization)
Data layer design (<one>RTK Query</one>, caching, revalidation)
External systems integration (EDO, Digital Signatures, 3rd party APIs)
Development of internal <one>automation</one> services (<two>Node.js</two>, <three>Python</three>)
Building <one>AI integrations</one> (<two>LLM</two>, <three>RAG</three>, <four>voice interfaces</four>)

architecture.title: Architectural Approach
items: System decomposition into independent areas of responsibility
Strict module boundary enforcement (<one>FSD</one>)
Contract-based interaction between layers
Event-driven model for <one>real-time</one> updates
State and side-effects minimization
Managing complexity through isolation and predictability

experience.title: Practical Experience
items: Financial systems implementation (balances, transactions, invoices, withdrawals)
Real-time systems engineering with status, chat, and notification synchronization
Complex catalogs development with filtration, parametrics, and dynamic querying
Entity lifecycle management (orders, statuses, deadlines, constraints)
Electronic document management and digital signature integration (including <one>desktop-bridge</one> automation)
Automation pipeline construction (screenshots, reports, PDF/Excel generation)
Headless browser interactions (<one>Playwright</one>) and bypassing external platform restrictions
Internal <one>real-time</one> messenger development with full state sync
Administrative management systems with moderation, accounting, and multi-tenancy

ai_systems.title: AI & Intelligent Systems
items: Voice AI-agent implementation with <one>real-time</one> interface control
Multi-service orchestration (<one>voice</one>, <two>RAG FAQ</two>, <three>retrieval search</three>)
<one>STT</one> / <two>TTS</two> / <three>LLM</three> integration into unified pipelines
<one>RAG</one> systems engineering (vector search, <two>LangChain</two>, <three>ChromaDB</three>, <four>Qdrant</four>)
Hybrid search: <one>SQL</one> + vector semantics + <two>reranking</two>
Voice-controlled <one>UI</one> with action confirmation (<two>ACK model</two>)
State synchronization between AI agent and interface
